meaning: n.(尤指对前世生活的)记忆,思想 [医]既往症,既往病历
examples: We become aware of these ideas through recollection or anamnesis.
Anamnesis: you have raised the Chinese Martyrs and Blessed to be models of our faith.
We should using ideal, faith, ambition and good anamnesis to aggrandizement the self-image of self.
